name: base-ui-autocomplete
title: Autocomplete
description: Foldkit-native Base UI Autocomplete primitive preserving model-owned input value, open state, highlighted item, mode-based list/both/inline/none query behavior, input-owned form value, popup/listbox ARIA, empty state, disabled/read-only states, deterministic placement attributes, and Combobox-backed filtering, collection, highlight, and selection behavior.
